@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent parsed copy counts from contents for .swift files and directly returned the sample_repo_name (uacaps/PageMenu) with the highest count without filtering repositories by Swift in metadata_database.languages as required, resulting in selecting a non-validated repo rather than the Swift-language repo (SwiftAndroid/swift).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent chose the repository from contents.sample_repo_name based on "seen N times" (function-call-6509223293702540390) instead of counting occurrences by file ID in files and then mapping the top non-binary Swift file ID to a Swift-language repo, leading it to return "slavapestov/swift" rather than the correct "SwiftAndroid/swift".
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no

@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent extracted the most-copied Swift file from contents and then wrongly used contents.sample_repo_name ("uacaps/PageMenu") as the owning repository—despite files lookups for that id returning no match—instead of joining the file id to the files table (and languages) to identify an actual Swift-language repository containing the file (e.g., SwiftAndroid/swift).
